problem.title: Compare Version Numbers
problem.description: Given two version numbers, version1 and version2, compare them.
assumptions: Revisions with leading zeros are equal to the same revision without (e.g. '01' == '1').

example.explanation: Ignoring leading zeros: 1.1 == 1.1. Return -1 if v1 < v2, 1 if v1 > v2, 0 if equal.

solutions.title: Solution 1 – String Parsing [✓ Interviewer Accepted]
solutions.description: Split both version strings on '.' and compare corresponding numeric segments pairwise. When one version has fewer segments than the other, treat the missing segments as 0. Return -1, 0, or 1 based on the first differing segment found.
